title: Welcome to Patriots for Action PAC
excerpt: What this PAC hub is, what it is not, and how to stay connected.
author: Patriots for Action PAC
bodyMarkdown:
We built this PAC site to keep supporters informed and equipped.

### What you’ll find here

- Events you can attend
- Updates you can share
- Ways to volunteer or contribute

County-level involvement lives on Patriots in Action, a separate **Nation Wide County-by-County Platform**, at **PatriotsInAction.com**.

title: How to submit an event
excerpt: Here’s how to share local activity with the team.
author: Patriots for Action PAC
bodyMarkdown:
Share what’s happening through Patriots in Action, a separate **Nation Wide County-by-County Platform**. For county-level involvement, use PatriotsInAction.com. If you need to reach the statewide PAC team, use the Contact page.

### What to include

- Title and start time
- Location or virtual link
- A short summary
- Registration link
